name: Strategy Inc
summary: Strategy Inc (formerly MicroStrategy) is a business intelligence and analytics software company that also holds significant Bitcoin reserves as a core part of its corporate strategy. The company provides software platforms for enterprise analytics and has made large-scale Bitcoin acquisitions a central element of its business model and capital allocation strategy.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
